text.title: Ai Assisted Backlog Deduplication — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the backlog have >=300 items, an embeddings API, a named PM owner, and a labelled calibration set?

branch.when: backlog_size >= 300 AND embeddings_api_available == true AND owner_named == true AND calibration_set_size >= 50
branch.conclusion: Run the full pipeline: embed → cluster → review → bulk-update. Log every merge/close with traceability.
Block. Hand-label 50 duplicate-pair examples first; without calibration the threshold is random.
Skip. Manual review is cheaper than the pipeline overhead.
